news.title: Banks drag on ASX; Oil slides lower
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has slid lower at the open despite more gains on Wall Street overnight, while oil prices retreated

news.title: Look beyond the headlines on Chalmers’ spending and you’ll see it’s not the main game
news.snippet: The treasurer’s spending isn’t as “out of control” as you might be led to believe – and it’s the wrong thing to judge him on when he reveals the budget in May.

news.title: Huge push to spare housing from feared tax
news.snippet: One type of homes could be spared from tax reforms currently being considered by the Albanese government.

news.title: ajor call on fuel supply after refinery blaze
news.snippet: One group of Aussies could be set for a hit to their hip pockets, an expert has warned, after the Viva Energy oil refinery burst into flames.

news.title: Wealthy Maple-Browns to offload two Woollahra shops; Centennial Flats on the market
news.snippet: The wealthy Maple-Brown family is selling two shops in leafy Woollahra and a newly constructed Dan Murphy’s has hit the market.

news.title: AI is taking entry-level jobs. For young workers, it’s a huge problem
news.snippet: Entry-level and graduate roles are at their lowest levels in a decade, spurring concerns about AI’s impact on young workers’ development.

news.title: Scott quit his corporate job to be a cleaner. He’s not the only one
news.snippet: Dissatisfaction with corporate jobs in Australia is on the rise in what some experts have labelled “The Great Burnout”.

news.title: ‘I gave everything’: Feuding Sydney pub barons face underpayment claims
news.snippet: Dozens of employees were allegedly underpaid at hospitality venues co-owned by Arthur Laundy and Fraser Short, according to a leaked audit.

news.title: Massive deal for Aussie farmers
news.snippet: A critical stock has been locked in for Australian farmers after the war in Iran crippled supply routes.

news.title: ‘No explanation’: Probe into suspicious trades
news.snippet: A “pattern” of suspiciously timed, highly lucrative trades, all made just before major announcements on the Iran War, is being investigated.

news.title: St Kilda announces appeal against Collard ban for homophobic slur
